# PHIL.037 ? Chan Buddhism

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** eastern_philosophy
**Subcategory:** chan_buddhism
**Domain:** EASTERN_PHILOSOPHY
**Status:** active

## Core Principles
Sudden enlightenment; Buddha-nature in all; meditation; direct transmission; non-reliance on scriptures; everyday mind

## Application
Recognize inherent Buddha-nature; value direct experience; see sacred in ordinary; sudden insight over gradual; meditation in action

## Key Values
- Sudden awakening
- Direct transmission
- Ordinary mind
- Meditation

philosophy, eastern-philosophy, chan-buddhism
